name: neuropixels-analysis
tagline: SpikeInterface-based end-to-end Neuropixels workflow: load, preprocess, drift-correct, spike-sort, and curate units.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped scientific workflow skill. Steps are concrete SpikeInterface API calls, dependencies and versions are declared, and optional network/API use (Hugging Face model downloads, Anthropic API for AI-assisted curation) is disclosed with explicit trust warnings rather than hidden. Minor gaps: no negative-trigger guidance and no explicit re-run/ide

highlights.summary: Model-based curation loads pretrained classifiers from Hugging Face via `trust_model=True` (lines 199-211), which deserializes remote model files. The skill does caveat 'only load models from sources

Installs numerous third-party packages/sorters (kilosort, mountainsort5, spykingcircus, ibllib, bombcell, huggingface_hub/skops) and pulls ML classifier weights from Hugging Face repos (lines 199-211,
No explicit 'do not use when' / negative-trigger section; domain is narrow (Neuropixels-specific) so misfires are unlikely, but the omission is a real gap for a large reference document.
